calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.
Cheryl Anne Sena, Esq. appeared with petitioner Kristin Laymon, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minors, Madison Grace Hanson-Laymon and Jackson Nicholas Hanson-Laymon, who were also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Kevin George, the minors' father, was present, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Madison Grace George-Laymon and Jackson Nicholas George Laymon.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
